message.content:
あなたはWindows PC上で動くYouTube Shorts自動生成パイプラインの作業担当です。short_04のShort動画用に、不足している2枚のシーン画像をGemini Webで生成し、動画をレンダリングしてください。アップロードは不要(私=親が後でやる)。最後に結果を報告してください。

# ゴール
1. 画像 C:\aaa\video-assets\ai\scenes\s04_3.png と s04_4.png を新規生成する(s04_1.png, s04_2.png は既に存在するので触らない)。
2. C:\aaa\video-assets\build_scene_shorts.ps1 を -Only 4 で実行し short_04.mp4 をレンダリングする。
3. レンダリング結果からフレームを抜き出し、マスコットが画面から切れていないか目視確認する。
4. 結果(成功/問題点、各画像とmp4のパス)を報告する。

# 生成する2枚の画像プロンプト(Gemini Webに日本語で入力する)
- s04_3.png : 「子供の絵風、緑の丸いマスコットのイラスト。全身。三十分以上寝過ぎてぐったり、まだ眠そうでだるそうな様子。横に小さな注意マーク。中央に配置して周囲にたっぷり余白。シンプルでかわいい手描き風、パステル背景、縦長9:16。」
- s04_4.png : 「子供の絵風、緑の丸いマスコットのイラスト。全身。目が覚めてスッキリ元気いっぱい、親指を立ててグッドポーズ。明るく爽やかな雰囲気。中央に配置して周囲にたっぷり余白。シンプルでかわいい手描き風、パステル背景、縦長9:16。」
重要: マスコットは必ず「全身」「中央配置」「周囲に余白」にすること(動画でズームしても切れないため)。

# Gemini Web 操作手順(Claude-in-Chrome MCPを使う)
- まず mcp__Claude_in_Chrome__select_browser を deviceId "9750e4d1-f75a-4d5a-a39e-5714e33ce781" で呼んでBrowser 2に接続する(list_connected_browsersは呼ばない=複数ブラウザ確認のAskUserQuestionを避けるため、直接select_browserする)。
- 画像1枚ごとに、必ず mcp__Claude_in_Chrome__navigate で "https://gemini.google.com/app" を開いて新規チャットにする(同一チャット連投は送信ボタンが固着するバグがあるため)。
- 入力欄(画面中央の「Geminiに相談」/「画像の説明を入力」ボックス)をクリック→typeでプロンプト入力→screenshotで入力テキストが正しく入ったか確認(漢字化け・空欄がないか)→青い上矢印(↑)の送信ボタンをクリック(key Returnは不安定なので使わない)。
- 送信後、画像生成に30〜60秒かかる。10秒待つ→mcp__Claude_in_Chrome__find で query "フルサイズの画像をダウンロード" を探す、を繰り返す。見つかったら(=生成完了)そのボタンをrefでクリックしてダウンロード。
- ダウンロード後、Bashツールで最新DLファイルを所定パスにコピー:
  cp -v "$(ls -t /c/Users/wallx/Downloads/Gemini_Generated_Image*.png 2>/dev/null | head -1)" "/c/aaa/video-assets/ai/scenes/s04_3.png"
  (2枚目は s04_4.png に。各画像ダウンロード直後に必ずコピーすること。順番を間違えないよう1枚ずつ完結させる)
- 注意: 全てのscreenshot/find/clickは tabId を Gemini のタブに対して行う。navigate の返り値で tabId が分かる。

# レンダリング(Bashツール または PowerShell)
- VOICEVOXエンジン(:50021)が稼働済みであることが前提(curl -s http://localhost:50021/version で確認できる)。
- PowerShellで実行: powershell -File "C:\aaa\video-assets\build_scene_shorts.ps1" -Only 4
  (このスクリプトはずんだもん音声で4シーンを合成し short_04.mp4 を C:\aaa\video-assets\shorts\ に出力する。"OK short 04 (..s)" が出れば成功)
- ※PowerShellの注意: -ExecutionPolicy Bypass は使えない(セキュリティ制御で不可)。普通に -File で呼ぶこと。もし実行ポリシーで止まる場合は powershell.exe -NoProfile -File ... を試す。

# フレーム確認
- Bashで: cd /c/aaa/video-assets/shorts && for t in 1 5 9 13; do ffmpeg -y -ss $t -i short_04.mp4 -frames:v 1 chk_$t.png -loglevel error; done
  (ffmpegのパスが通っていない場合は C:\Users\wallx\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\Gyan.FFmpeg*\...\bin\ffmpeg.exe を探して使う。build_scene_shorts.ps1内の$ff取得ロジックが参考になる)
- 抜いた chk_*.png を Read ツールで開いて、マスコットの顔・体が枠で切れていないか確認。確認後 chk_*.png は削除。

# 報告
- s04_3.png, s04_4.png の生成可否、short_04.mp4 のパスと尺、フレーム確認の結果(切れの有無)を簡潔に報告してください。問題があればどのシーンかも。

attachment.content:
- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
- higgsfield-generate: Generate images/videos/3D assets/audio via Higgsfield AI. Defaults:
GPT Image 2 for image/design/text, Seedance 2.0 for
video, Nano Banana 2/Pro for character/reference images,
Marketing Studio for ads, Sonilo/Mirelo for audio, plus
Soul models and Kling 3.0.
Use when: "generate an image", "make a video", "animate
this photo", "image-to-video", "edit/stylize/remix this
image", "produce a clip", "reframe this video", "edit
this video from a sketch", "create a 3D model", "make a
GLB/mesh", "create a sound effect", "make music",
"text-to-audio", "create an ad", "make a UGC video",
"product demo", "unboxing", "brand video", "presenter
video", "import product from URL", "create avatar for ad",
or "analyze video virality". Supports image-to-image,
image-to-video, image-to-3D (`multi_image_to_3d`),
text-to-audio (`mirelo_text_to_audio`), text-to-music
(`sonilo_music`), workflow generation (`draw_to_video`,
`reframe`), references, job/upload IDs, Marketing Studio,
and Virality Predictor (`brain_activity`).
Chain with higgsfield-soul-id for face/identity consistency.
NOT for: Soul Character training (use higgsfield-soul-id),
product photoshoots, marketplace listing cards,
text/chat/TTS tasks.
- higgsfield-marketplace-cards: Generate marketplace product image cards through Higgsfield: compliant
main image, secondary product images, and A+ style content modules. Use when
the user asks for marketplace listing images, product detail cards,
secondary product images, product infographics, lifestyle listing shots,
A+ style content, marketplace image sets, or sales-ready product visuals.
Backend owns marketplace compliance references and prompt templates; this skill
only routes user intent to the CLI.
NOT for generic brand product photography without marketplace/listing context
(use higgsfield-product-photoshoot), video generation or UGC ads (use
higgsfield-generate), or Soul Character training (use higgsfield-soul-id).
- higgsfield-product-photoshoot: Generate brand-quality product images through Higgsfield product-photoshoot
prompt enhancement on GPT Image 2 / gpt_image_2. Entry point for professional
brand/product visuals.
Use when: "product photo", "studio shot", "lifestyle image", "Pinterest pin",
"hero/banner", "carousel", "ad creative", "Meta ads", "virtual try-on",
"model wearing", "person holding product", "closeup with hands",
"levitating/floating/splash product", "CGI/surreal product", "restyle",
"seasonal/aesthetic variation", or any product, brand, or paid-social creative.
Modes: product_shot, lifestyle_scene, closeup_product_with_person,
moodboard_pin, hero_banner, social_carousel, ad_creative_pack,
virtual_model_tryout, conceptual_product, restyle. Backend assembles the final
prompt; never freehand it.
NOT for: no-product text-to-image (use higgsfield-generate), branded avatar
video (use higgsfield-generate Marketing Studio), marketplace listing cards
(use higgsfield-marketplace-cards), Soul Character training (use
higgsfield-soul-id).
- higgsfield-soul-id
- anthropic-skills:consolidate-memory: Reflective pass over your memory files — merge duplicates, fix stale facts, prune the index.
- anthropic-skills:docx
- anthropic-skills:pdf
- anthropic-skills:pptx
- anthropic-skills:schedule
- anthropic-skills:setup-cowork: Guided Cowork setup — install role-matched plugins, connect your tools, try a skill.
- anthropic-skills:skill-creator
- anthropic-skills:xlsx
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review
- security-review

両方とも全身・中央配置・余白十分で要件を満たしています。s04_3はぐったり眠そうな様子+注意マーク、s04_4は元気にグッドポーズで意図通りです。レンダリングを実行します。

input.command:
cd /c/aaa/video-assets/shorts
FF=$(ls -t /c/Users/wallx/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Packages/Gyan.FFmpeg*/*/bin/ffmpeg.exe 2>/dev/null | head -1)
echo "ffmpeg: $FF"
ls -la short_04.mp4
for t in 1 5 9 13; do "$FF" -y -ss $t -i short_04.mp4 -frames:v 1 chk_$t.png -loglevel error; done
ls -la chk_*.png

## 結果報告

**1. 画像生成 — 成功**
- `C:\aaa\video-assets\ai\scenes\s04_3.png` （30分以上寝過ぎてぐったり＋注意マーク）
- `C:\aaa\video-assets\ai\scenes\s04_4.png` （元気いっぱいグッドポーズ）
- 両方ともGemini Webで1枚ずつ新規チャットで生成、全身・中央配置・余白十分な構図で取得できました。s04_1, s04_2は未変更です。

**2. レンダリング — 成功**
- `C:\aaa\video-assets\shorts\short_04.mp4`（約16.9秒、VOICEVOX音声合成・ずんだもん）
- スクリプト出力: `OK short 04 (16.9s)` → `SCENE BATCH DONE`

**3. フレーム目視確認 — 問題なし**
1秒・5秒・9秒・13秒の4フレームを抜き出して確認。4シーン全てでマスコットの頭から足先まで画面内に収まっており、zoompanによるズーム後も切れは見られませんでした。確認用の一時ファイル(chk_*.png)は削除済みです。

問題点は特にありません。アップロードは行っていません（親が後で実施）。
